_help.name: Shown in header/title, e.g. 'Sonoma County'.
_help.zoom: City ~12, county ~10, region ~8. 4 = whole US until you set your place.
_help.fallback: Sort origin when a visitor declines location. Usually same as center.
_help.categories: Empty = show all categories in the data; or list a subset.
_help.note: The one file that makes this instance local. See SETUP.md.
